tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Whip Appeal
by Babyface (Kenneth Edmonds)
as performed on the live album “MTV Unplugged NYC 1997”
Because of bring Unplugged, the chords and whole song structure
is very different to the “Tender Lover” version.

Capo 4 - Standard Tuning
Some chord voicings are more straighforward
when played this way (the hand moves to these positions more easily:
B7sus4/E:     022202 (actually is Esus2sus4)
Am13:         X02012
Cadd9:        X32030
E/G#:         476454
(as barre chord on 4th relative fret with C shape and playing E string)
C#sus4addb2:  X45774
(as barre chord on 4th relative fret)
Bm6:          7X677X
Everything else is played like normal.

  // Intro:
| [ch]Am13[/ch]  [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]   | [ch]Am13[/ch]   [ch]B7sus4/E[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   | [ch]Am13[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]  [ch]E/G#[/ch]   | [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Am13[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch] |
[tab]| [ch]Am13[/ch]  [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]   | [ch]Am13[/ch]   [ch]B7sus4/E[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   | [ch]Am13[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]  [ch]E/G#[/ch]   | [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Am13[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch]   NC |
                                                                                    Somebody... (see below)[/tab]

  // Verse:
[tab]NC               [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]
Somebody told me[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
There'd be trouble at home[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am13[/ch]
'Cause we never talk a lot[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7sus4/E[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
When we spend time alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Am13[/ch]
So how are we supposed to know[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Know when something is wrong[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Well, we've got a right to communicate[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]E/D[/ch]
It keeps a happy home[/tab]


  // Pre-chorus:
[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]AM7[/ch]          [ch]BM[/ch]
And no one does it like me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G#m[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
And no one but you baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7/A[/ch]                            [ch]Bsus2[/ch]    NC
Has that kind of whip appeal on me[/tab]


  // Chorus:
| Click   | Click   | Click   | Click   |

| Click   | Click   | Click   | 
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am13[/ch]
Keep on whippin' on me, yeah[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]E7[/ch]
Work it on me, yeah[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Am13[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]E7[/ch]
Whip all your sweet sweet lovin' on me[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am13[/ch]
Keep on whippin' on me (as you)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]E7[/ch]
Work it on me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]E7[/ch]
Whip all your sweet sweet lovin' on me[/tab]


  // Pre-chorus 2:
[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]AM7[/ch]          [ch]BM[/ch]
And no one does it like me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G#m[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
And no one but you baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7/A[/ch]                            [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
Has that kind of whip appeal on me[/tab]


  // Bridge 1:
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
Whatever you want (Whatever you want baby)[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E7sus2[/ch]
It's alright with me (yeah it's alright with me)[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]AM7[/ch]
'Cause you've got that whip appeal[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bsus2[/ch]   [ch]B/A[/ch]
So work it on me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#m[/ch]
It's better than love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
Sweet as can be[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]C#5/B[/ch] [ch]G#5[/ch] [ch]AM7[/ch]
You've got that whip appeal[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
So whip it on me[/tab]


  // Bridge 2 (same structure as #1, but more vocal embellishments; 3 & 4 also continue/repeat):
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
Whatever you want[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E7sus2[/ch]
It's alright with me[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]AM7[/ch]
'Cause you've got that whip appeal[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bsus2[/ch]   [ch]B/A[/ch]
So work it on me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#m[/ch]
It's better than love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
Sweet as can be[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]C#5/B[/ch] [ch]G#5[/ch] [ch]AM7[/ch]
You've got that whip appeal[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
So whip it on me[/tab]

  // Bridge 3 (same structure again):
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
Whatever you want[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E7sus2[/ch]
It's alright with me[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]AM7[/ch]
'Cause you've got that whip appeal[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bsus2[/ch]   [ch]B/A[/ch]
So work it on me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#m[/ch]
It's better than love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
Sweet as can be[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]C#5/B[/ch] [ch]G#5[/ch] [ch]AM7[/ch]
You've got that whip appeal[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
So whip it on me[/tab]

  // Final Bridge (starts the same, then changes at end):
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
Whatever you want[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E7sus2[/ch]
It's alright with me[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]AM7[/ch]
'Cause you've got that whip appeal[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bsus2[/ch]   [ch]B/A[/ch]
So work it on me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#m[/ch]
It's better than love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
Sweet as can be[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]C#5/B[/ch] [ch]G#5[/ch] [ch]AM7[/ch]
You've got that whip appeal[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]    N/C
No, no, no, no[/tab]

  // Chorus 2:
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am13[/ch]
Keep on whippin' on me, yeah[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]E7[/ch]
Work it on me, yeah[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Am13[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]E7[/ch]
Whip all your sweet sweet lovin' on me[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am13[/ch]
Keep on whippin' on me (as you)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]E7[/ch]
Work it on me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]AM7[/ch]
Whip all your sweet sweet lovin' on me[/tab]


  // Outro:
[ch]AM7[/ch]
[ch]AM7/G#[/ch]
[ch]F#m11[/ch]
[ch]E11[/ch]
[ch]Bm6[/ch]
